productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
productionRequired.purpose: Public URL used in generated previews, delivery manifests, and callback payloads.

productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_R2_ACCOUNT_ID
productionRequired.purpose: Cloudflare account id for R2-backed artifact persistence.

productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_R2_BUCKET
productionRequired.purpose: R2 bucket for website/UI artifacts, packages, screenshots, and manifests.

productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID
productionRequired.purpose: R2 write credential for production artifact uploads.

productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
productionRequired.purpose: R2 secret credential for production artifact uploads.

productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_AE_DELIVERY_ENDPOINT
productionRequired.purpose: AE CommandHub delivery intake endpoint for production handoff.

productionRequired.name: SKYEWEB_SKYDEXIA_ENDPOINT
productionRequired.purpose: SkyDexia generation/orchestration endpoint for production connected mode.

productionRequired.name: SKYGATEFS13_BASE_URL
productionRequired.purpose: Canonical SkyeGateFS13 base URL used by browser and server-side connected mode.

productionRequired.name: SKYGATEFS13_EVENT_MIRROR_SECRET
productionRequired.purpose: Secret used by SkyeWebCreatorMax to mirror audit/billing/generation events into SkyeGateFS13.

productionRequired.name: SKYGATEFS13_APP_CLIENT_ID
productionRequired.purpose: SkyeGateFS13 OAuth app client id for SkyeWebCreatorMax service access.

productionRequired.name: SKYGATEFS13_APP_CLIENT_SECRET
productionRequired.purpose: SkyeGateFS13 OAuth app client secret for SkyeWebCreatorMax service access.

optional.name: SKYEWEB_R3_BUCKET
optional.purpose: Optional secondary artifact persistence target when an R3-compatible layer is available.

optional.name: SKYEWEB_SIGNING_SECRET
optional.purpose: Optional webhook/event signing secret for production API callbacks.

readinessRule: Local smokes must pass without env vars. Production readiness may fail only for productionRequired env vars.
